untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'earlier trend direction' and reversal confirmation, which cannot be fully encoded without multi-bar trend analysis or custom indicators. 'Lilliput candles' (extremely small bodies) approximated using body < atr_14. 'Drifting toward MA' approximated using price_pos_20 (20-period position) in mid-range. Signal intent is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT on prior trend, but entry conditions here are simplified.
translation_notes: Lilliput candles modeled as small body size relative to ATR; negligible volume modeled as volume < hvol_20; narrow range drifting toward MA approximated using price_pos_20 between 0.3-0.7 (mid-position in 20-period range); exit uses MA crossover as reasonable reversal signal since AUTHOR_SILENT on exits
